title: JustPotionHud
description: A clean, customizable potion effect HUD overlay
body:
📜 About
Note-If you want to have the hud in horizontal mode You need to have the potion name on or else it would not work.

JustPotionHUD is a lightweight Fabric mod that moves Minecraft’s potion effect display to a cleaner, centered position — perfect for players who want a minimal, immersive interface.

✨ Features

Moves potion HUD to left-middle of your screen.

Small footprint — no performance impact.

🛠 Compatibility

Minecraft: 1.21, 1.21.1 (more versions coming soon)

Fabric Loader: 0.16.9+

Java: 21+

📦 Installation

Install Fabric Loader and Fabric API.

Drop the justpotionhud-x.x.x.jar file into your mods folder.

Launch Minecraft and enjoy a cleaner HUD.
